mapper.select: SELECT c.name, sc.progress FROM student_course sc JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sc.student_id = #{userId} AND sc.is_deleted = 0 AND sc.progress IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sc.progress DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN progress BETWEEN 0 AND 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section1, SUM(CASE WHEN progress BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section2, SUM(CASE WHEN progress BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section3, SUM(CASE WHEN progress BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section4, SUM(CASE WHEN progress BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section5 FROM student_course WHERE student_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND progress IS NOT NULL

SELECT c.name, sc.score FROM student_course sc JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sc.student_id = #{userId} AND sc.is_deleted = 0 AND sc.score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sc.score DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN score BETWEEN 0 AND 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section1, SUM(CASE WHEN score BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section2, SUM(CASE WHEN score BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section3, SUM(CASE WHEN score BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section4, SUM(CASE WHEN score BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section5 FROM student_course WHERE student_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND score IS NOT NULL
